installation: Primary: shadcn CLI against Aceternity's registry. Two forms: (1) direct URL: `npx shadcn@latest add https://ui.aceternity.com/registry/{name}.json`; (2) namespaced (shadcn CLI 3.0): add `"@aceternity": "https://ui.aceternity.com/registry/{name}.json"` under `registries` in components.json, then `npx shadcn@latest add @aceternity/<component>` (e.g. `npx shadcn@latest add @aceternity/bento-grid`). Requires prior `npx shadcn@latest init` (installs cn() utility in lib/utils.ts, CSS variables; recommended answers: New York style, Zinc base color, CSS variables). Manual copy-paste is also fully supported: `npm i motion clsx tailwind-merge`, add the cn() helper, then paste the component source from each doc page. An MCP server for registry search also exists.
dependencies: motion (successor to framer-motion; used by nearly every component)
@tabler/icons-react (used in most demos: Floating Dock, Resizable Navbar, Bento Grid icons)
three / @react-three/fiber / three-globe (only 3D Globe, GitHub Globe, World Map — all marked skip)
tailwindVersion: Tailwind CSS v4 is the current target (site advertises Next.js 15 + Tailwind v4 throughout); v3 configs still documented per component. With Astro 5 + Tailwind v4 no tailwind.config.js is needed — just the cn() utility (clsx + tailwind-merge) and the shadcn CSS variables from init. A few components reference custom keyframes/utilities defined inline in the snippet (v4 @theme syntax shown in docs).
notes: All components ship with "use client" and depend on motion — in Astro every one must be a React island (client:visible for below-fold, client:load for the navbar/tracing beam which use scroll listeners). motion v11+/motion package is React 19 compatible; components are plain function components, no React-19 blockers observed. Gotchas: (1) components are written for Next.js — several import next/link or next/image (Link Preview, card demos); swap for / in Astro. (2) Link Preview calls the external api.microlink.io service for screenshots (its next.config image-domain step is Next-specific; in Astro just use the URL directly) — consider isStatic mode with pre-captured images for a static blog. (3) Code Block bundles react-syntax-highlighter (~heavy); for a mostly-static blog prefer Astro/Shiki for plain blocks and use Aceternity's CodeBlock only where you need tabbed/multi-file interactive snippets. (4) Grid and Dot Backgrounds is essentially pure CSS and can be inlined into Astro components with zero JS — cheapest win. (5) Scroll components (Tracing Beam, Timeline, Sticky Scroll Reveal) use motion's useScroll and need real hydration, not server rendering only. (6) Everything three.js-based (3D Globe, GitHub Globe, World Map, 3D Marquee) is 500KB+ of deps — marked skip. (7) Registry install assumes shadcn project layout (components/ui, lib/utils); run shadcn init once even in Astro, or copy-paste manually.

components.name: Grid and Dot Backgrounds
components.blogUse: Site-wide subtle grid/dot texture behind hero, 404, and section breaks; CSS-only so usable in pure Astro with zero JS

components.name: Spotlight New
components.blogUse: Subtle animated spotlight gradient on the dark homepage hero

components.name: Text Generate Effect
components.blogUse: Hero title / post h1 fading in word-by-word on load; restrained enough for Swiss-minimal

components.name: Bento Grid
components.blogUse: Homepage featured-posts grid with one large + several small cards

components.name: Card Hover Effect
components.blogUse: Post list/grid where a soft highlight slides to the hovered post card

components.name: Resizable Navbar
components.blogUse: Main header: shrinks on scroll, includes mobile menu subcomponents; slot in theme switcher as a NavbarButton

components.name: Codeblock
components.blogUse: Syntax-highlighted code blocks in posts with filename header, line highlighting, and multi-tab file switching (react-syntax-highlighter)

components.name: Tracing Beam
components.blogUse: Post page: gradient beam tracing reading progress alongside the prose column (TOC-adjacent affordance)

components.name: Link Preview
components.blogUse: Hover preview cards for external links inside post prose (microlink API or static screenshots)

components.name: Tabs
components.blogUse: Tags page: animated tab switching between tag groups or post filters

components.name: Timeline
components.blogUse: About page career/history timeline, or year-grouped posts archive with sticky headers and scroll beam

components.name: Placeholders And Vanish Input
components.blogUse: Newsletter CTA email input with rotating placeholder prompts and vanish-on-submit

components.name: Stateful Button
components.blogUse: Newsletter subscribe button with loading spinner and success check states

components.name: Floating Navbar
components.blogUse: Alternative header: hides on scroll down, reveals on scroll up (pick this OR Resizable Navbar)

components.name: Navbar Menu
components.blogUse: Dropdown mega-menu nav if the blog grows sections; overkill for a minimal blog now

components.name: Floating Dock
components.blogUse: Footer or fixed-corner macOS-style dock for social links (GitHub, X, RSS)

components.name: Sticky Banner
components.blogUse: Top announcement bar for a new post or newsletter launch; auto-hides on scroll

components.name: Sidebar
components.blogUse: Collapsible sidebar if you add a docs/series section; could host a TOC

components.name: Hover Border Gradient
components.blogUse: Primary CTA button (newsletter, 'read more') with animated gradient border on hover

components.name: Magnetic Button
components.blogUse: Micro-interaction on footer social icons or the theme switcher

components.name: Moving Border
components.blogUse: Featured-post or subscribe CTA button; slightly flashier than hover-border-gradient

components.name: Tailwind CSS buttons
components.blogUse: Copy-paste collection; several minimal variants suit a Swiss-style blog with zero JS

components.name: Flip Words
components.blogUse: Hero subtitle rotating through topics you write about ('systems / rust / design')

components.name: Hero Highlight
components.blogUse: Animated highlight sweep on one key phrase in the hero title

components.name: Pointer Highlight
components.blogUse: In-view pointer+border emphasis on a phrase in hero or about-page intro

components.name: Typewriter Effect
components.blogUse: Hero tagline typed out; use sparingly, competes with Text Generate Effect

components.name: Encrypted Text
components.blogUse: 404 page scramble/decrypt headline; fits a dark technical blog

components.name: Text Hover Effect
components.blogUse: Giant outline '404' text with hover stroke reveal on the 404 page

components.name: Squiggly Text
components.blogUse: Playful 404 headline alternative

components.name: Noise Background
components.blogUse: Subtle animated noise/grain texture behind hero or newsletter section; keep intensity low for minimal look

components.name: Dotted Glow Background
components.blogUse: Soft glowing dot field behind newsletter CTA on dark theme

components.name: Spotlight
components.blogUse: Original SVG spotlight for the hero; alternative to Spotlight New

components.name: Background Beams
components.blogUse: Faint beam paths behind the newsletter CTA section; dark-native and reasonably subtle

components.name: Aurora Background
components.blogUse: Hero backdrop; borderline too colorful for Swiss-minimal — dial down opacity if used

components.name: Background Gradient
components.blogUse: Animated gradient border wrapper for one featured post card

components.name: Glowing Effect
components.blogUse: Pointer-following border glow on post cards; subtle on dark backgrounds

components.name: Card Spotlight
components.blogUse: Mouse-following spotlight on the featured post card

components.name: Direction Aware Hover
components.blogUse: Post cover-image cards where overlay slides in from the cursor's entry direction

components.name: Focus Cards
components.blogUse: Image-led post grid that blurs siblings on hover

components.name: Expandable Card
components.blogUse: Tags/archive page: click a post card to expand an inline excerpt before navigating

components.name: Tooltip Card
components.blogUse: Footnote/reference hover cards inside post prose

components.name: Terminal
components.blogUse: Animated terminal window for CLI walkthroughs in technical posts

components.name: Compare
components.blogUse: Before/after image slider inside posts (design or refactor comparisons)

components.name: Lens
components.blogUse: Magnifier zoom on screenshots/diagrams inside posts

components.name: Animated Tooltip

components.name: Animated Modal

components.name: Infinite Moving Cards
